name: Multi-Cloud Security Framework (MSc Thesis)
bullet_points: Designed and implemented an open-source multi-cloud security framework integrating Open Policy Agent (OPA), HashiCorp Vault, MinIO, and Falco to provide centralised access control, secret management, scalable object storage, and real-time threat detection.
Implemented role-based access policies, dynamically issued credentials, and monitored storage operations to detect and alert unauthorised activity.
Validated the framework's functionality, demonstrating secure policy enforcement, credential management, and intrusion detection with low latency and high throughput.
Delivered a vendor-neutral, scalable solution for multi-cloud environments, addressing key industry cloud security needs.

name: Cloud and DevOps Projects
bullet_points: Developed and deployed containerised web applications using Docker and AWS Cloud9, managing AWS re- sources including EC2, ECS, Elastic Load Balancer and API Gateway.
Implemented CI/CD pipelines using AWS CodePipeline, GitHub Actions, and related AWS services for automated builds, testing, and deployment.

Built a serverless, API-driven meal management web application leveraging AWS Lambda, API Gateway, Elastic Beanstalk, and multi-source API integrations with large language model (LLM) back-end processing.

Designed a hospital bed management system using Flask, AWS RDS, SQLAlchemy, containerised deployments via Docker and AWS ECS, with automated CI/CD pipelines, GitHub Actions integration, and code quality management using SonarQube.
